use_cases: Display and adjust a numeric count value with neumorphic styling
Interactive counter for dashboards, settings panels, or product pages
Increment/decrement values with tactile press feedback
Minimal counter UI for mobile apps and web interfaces
Showcase neumorphic design patterns in UI component libraries
ai_summary: A neumorphic counter component featuring a circular display and rounded action buttons with dynamic shadow states. The design uses inset and extruded box shadows to create a soft, embossed appearance that responds to hover and click interactions. Buttons transition between pressed (inset shadow) and unpressed (raised shadow) states, providing tactile feedback for increment and decrement actions.
